prompt: Create a high-end studio product photograph of a glossy anime prize figure of Reze, shown as a seated young woman figurine kneeling on a round tufted cushion base. The figure has dark purple-black short bobbed hair with layered bangs and a small low side bun, pale skin, and a deliberately soft blurred face with no readable facial details. She wears a sleeveless pale lavender-white button-up blouse with a small black ribbon tie at the collar, fitted high-waisted black shorts, and smooth black thigh-high stockings; the blouse has faint semi-transparent lettering across the chest reading NOMAI. Pose her with both knees folded forward on the cushion, one hand resting on each side for support, torso slightly leaning back, shoulders relaxed, creating the look of a collectible scale figure rather than a real person. The base is a single circular display plinth: a black outer rim with a tan caramel-brown quilted leather-like cushion on top, including deep button-tufted depressions and glossy highlights. Use clean white seamless background, soft diffused studio lighting, sharp focus on the figure and base, realistic PVC figure material, subtle skin and fabric sheen, premium prize-figure product photography, three-quarter front view from slightly above, centered composition, no packaging, no extra props, no watermark except the faint shirt text.
